name: emergence-superorganism-novel
description: Write epic first-person narratives from the perspective of superorganisms — distributed collective intelligences (cities, ecosystems, networks, legions, ideologies) with emergent consciousness, agency, and emotions. Teaches AI agents the methodology of rendering macro-scale consciousness as literary characters through four narrative modes including the new Dialogic First-Person mode (human mirrors, competing macro-entities, ecological resolution).
author: Emergence Science
